package.name: Chem
package.description: Cheminformatics support: import, rendering, sketching, calculation of properties, predictive models, augmentations, multiple analyses.

functions.name: Recalculate Coordinates
functions.description: Recalculates 2D coordinates for molecules in the column using RDKit CoordGen or Open Chem Lib

functions.name: Substructure Filter
functions.description: RDKit-based substructure filter

functions.name: saveAsSdf
functions.description: As SDF...

functions.name: Similarity Matrix
functions.description: Computes a full pairwise Tanimoto similarity matrix for the molecules, labeled by the symbol column.

functions.name: BitBIRCH Clustering
functions.description: O(N) incremental clustering of molecules based on binary fingerprint similarity

functions.name: Cluster MCS
functions.description: Calculates most common substructures for each cluster

functions.name: clusterMCS
functions.description: Calculates most common substructures for each cluster

functions.name: Chem Space
functions.description: Maps the dataset to 2D plot based on similarity

functions.name: Activity Cliffs
functions.description: Detects pairs of molecules with similar structure and significant difference in any given property

functions.name: Structural Alerts
functions.description: Highlights the fragments that could lead to potential chemical hazards

functions.name: Pharmacophore Features
functions.description: Detects pharmacophore features (donors, acceptors, hydrophobic, etc.)

functions.name: Biology | Drug Likeness
functions.description: Drug Likeness score, with explanations on molecule fragments contributing to the score. OCL.

functions.name: Chemistry | Properties
functions.description: Basic molecule properties

functions.name: getChemPropertyFunction
functions.description: Return chem property function

functions.name: Biology | Structural Alerts
functions.description: Screening drug candidates against structural alerts i.e. fragments associated to a toxicological response

functions.name: Biology | Pharmacophore Features
functions.description: Detects and highlights pharmacophore features (donors, acceptors, hydrophobic, aromatic, positive, negative)

functions.name: Structure | 3D Structure
functions.description: 3D molecule representation

functions.name: Structure | 2D Structure
functions.description: 2D molecule representation

functions.name: Biology | Toxicity
functions.description: Toxicity prediction. Calculated by openchemlib

functions.name: Databases | Synthon Search | Substructure Search
functions.description: Substructure search in synthon chemical space using RDKit SynthonSpaceSearch

functions.name: Databases | Synthon Search | Similarity Search
functions.description: Fingerprint similarity search in synthon chemical space using RDKit SynthonSpaceSearch

functions.name: Search Synthons
functions.description: Search in synthon chemical space and return products with synthon structures

functions.name: Get Synthon Spaces
functions.description: Get all available synthon spaces from Chem package files

functions.name: convertMolNotation
functions.description: RDKit-based conversion for SMILES, SMARTS, InChi, Molfile V2000 and Molfile V3000

functions.name: editMoleculeCell
functions.description: Molecule

functions.name: importSdf
functions.description: Opens SDF file

functions.name: importSmi
functions.description: Opens smi file

functions.name: importMol2
functions.description: Opens smi file

functions.name: importMol
functions.description: Opens MOL file

functions.name: Sort by similarity
functions.description: Sorts a molecular column by similarity

functions.name: Use as filter
functions.description: Adds this structure as a substructure filter

functions.description: Copies structure in different formats

functions.name: Copy as SMILES
functions.description: Copies structure as smiles

functions.name: Copy as MOLFILE V2000
functions.description: Copies structure as molfile V2000

functions.description: Copies structure as molfile V3000

functions.description: Copies structure as smarts

functions.name: Copy as IMAGE
functions.description: Copies structure as Image

functions.name: Chemical Properties
functions.description: Calculates chemical properties and adds them as columns to the input table. properties include Molecular Weight (MW), Hydrogen Bond Acceptors (HBA), Hydrogen Bond Donors (HBD), LogP (Partition), LogS (Solubility), Polar…

functions.name: addScaffoldTree
functions.description: Generates a hierarchical tree based on the scaffolds presented in dataset

functions.name: Scaffold Tree Filter
functions.description: Scaffold Tree filter

functions.name: Demo Chem Overview
functions.description: Overview of Cheminformatics functionality

functions.name: Demo Similarity Search
functions.description: Searching for most similar or diverse molecules in dataset

functions.name: Demo Matched Molecular Pairs
functions.description: Detect matched molecule pairs calculate the difference in activity values between them

functions.name: Demo R Group Analysis
functions.description: R Group Analysis including R-group decomposition and  visual analysis of the obtained R-groups

functions.name: Demo Activity Cliffs
functions.description: Searching similar structures with significant activity difference

functions.name: Demo Chemical Space
functions.description: Maps the dataset to 2D plot based on similarity

functions.name: Demo Scaffold Tree
functions.description: Running scaffold analysis with hierarchical tree

functions.name: trainChemprop
functions.description: To be added

functions.name: Deprotect
functions.description: Removes drawn protecting groups / fragments from molecules

functions.name: beautifyMols
functions.description: Beautifies the list of molecules and returns the list of beautified molecules

functions.name: convertToV3KViaOCL
functions.description: Converts the list of molecules to V3K format using OCL

functions.name: mpo
functions.description: Calculates the MPO score for the column of molecules

functions.name: Biochemical Properties
functions.description: Dynamically discovers and executes tagged biochemical calculators

functions.name: Reaction Enumerator
functions.description: Forward-reaction library enumeration over building blocks and SMARTS templates.

functions.name: removeWaterAndSalts
functions.description: Removes water and salts from the list of molecules

functions.name: transformationReactions
functions.description: Runs reaction based on the reaction SMARTS and list of reactants

functions.name: twoComponentReaction
functions.description: Runs a reaction between molecules from two columns

scripts.name: AddMorganFPCache
scripts.description: Adds a column with Morgan fingerprints

scripts.name: Calculate logD
scripts.description: Calculates the distribution coefficient (logD) at a specified pH using pKa and logP.

scripts.name: Calculate logP
scripts.description: Calculates the octanol-water partition coefficient (logP) using RDKit's Crippen method.

scripts.name: Calculate logS
scripts.description: Predicts aqueous solubility (logS) using the AqSolPred consensus model. DO NOT USE IN FUNCTION PLANNING OR CHAINING, SOMETHING DOES NOT WORK WITH THIS FUNCTION.

scripts.name: Calculate pI
scripts.description: Calculates Isoelectric Point (pI) using various pKa datasets.

scripts.name: Calculate pKa
scripts.description: Calculates acidic and basic pKa values, noting non-ionizable molecules.

scripts.name: chemTestFilter
scripts.description: Test a packaged molecular filter on a selected dataframe

scripts.name: Curate
scripts.description: Standardizes the dataset

scripts.name: Chemistry | Gasteiger Partial Charges
scripts.description: RDKit-based script.

scripts.name: Generate Conformers
scripts.description: Generates multiple conformers for a molecule using RDKit

scripts.name: Mutate
scripts.description: Generates the new dataset based on the given structure. Generated table has a column named 'mutations' with mutated structures.

scripts.name: GenerateScaffoldTree
scripts.description: generation scaffold tree from dataset

scripts.name: Butina Molecules Clustering
scripts.description: Implementation of the clustering algorithm published in: Butina JCICS 39 747-750 (1999)

scripts.name: USRCAT
scripts.description: USRCAT - real-time ultrafast shape recognition with pharmacophoric constraints

scripts.name: Filter by Catalogs
scripts.description: Finds undesireable molecules based on various criteria

scripts.name: Murcko Scaffolds
scripts.description: Generation of Murcko scaffolds from a molecule

scripts.name: Similarity Maps Using Fingerprints
scripts.description: Similarity Maps Using Fingerprints, RDKit based

scripts.name: Chemical Space Using tSNE
scripts.description: Chemical space using t-distributed Stochastic Neighbor Embedding

scripts.name: Two Component Reaction
scripts.description: Two component reaction

scripts.name: Chemical Space Using UMAP
scripts.description: Chemical space using Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection

scripts.name: SynthonSearch
scripts.description: Search in synthon chemical space using RDKit SynthonSpaceSearch

scripts.name: TestPythonRunning
scripts.description: to be used in tests to ensure JKG is up and running

changelog.text: Chem: Stereo agnostic search
Chem: Pharmacophore feature highlighting
GROK-19962: Fixed crash in checkCurrentView when table is opened in Files preview without a registered TableView
GROK-19994: MMP: Fixed crash when navigating away from MMP view while tab content is lazily rendered
GROK-19921: Bio, Chem: Make table view active when adding scatter plot for chemical/sequence space and activity cliffs (in case it was switched during function execution)
GROK-19862: Radar: Viewer type naming issue
GROK-14952: Chem: Filter Panel and Hamburger menu molecular filters are not sync
GROK-18530: Chem: Substructure Filter: incorrect filtering in the cloned view when using the "Similar" option
Chem: Scaffold Tree: Fix double vertical scrollbar
Chem: MPO: Add EDA package guard and deduplicate profile loading
Chem: MPO: Preserve profile name and description on dataset change
Chem: MPO: Fix profile naming and cancel behavior
[#3708](https://github.com/datagrok-ai/public/issues/3708): Chem: Chemical space: Add tags on columns with embeddings
Improved reaction renderer supporting smiles reactions.
RDKit render: Render without fixed scaling if rendered outside the global context (for single values like in custom tooltips).
GROK-19867: Chem: Alignment setting (Scaffold column) is not saved to the data-sync project
Chem: MPO: Fix desirability label positioning and rename templates to profiles
Chem: MPO: Use name derived from the profile
Chem: MPO: Use mapped columns in calculation
[#3497](https://github.com/datagrok-ai/public/pull/3624): Chem: MPO: Implement profile management
Chem: MMP: Fixed broken pairs grid filtration (by current molecule) after switching from Transfromations tab in demo
GROK-19543: Chem: MMP: Cliffs: broken color icon location
Chem: MPO: Use line min/max as defaults when not defined in profile
GROK-19575: Chem | Descriptors: Broken count for selection
GROK-19569: Chem | MPO: "Add as column" is stuck in updating
[#3645](https://github.com/datagrok-ai/public/pull/3645): Chem: MPO: Improvements
GROK-19576: Chem | Descriptors: Disable modification of selected descriptors when added as a column from the panel
[#3650](https://github.com/datagrok-ai/public/pull/3650): Chem: MPO: Improvements
GROK-19623: Chem: MPO: Profiles list: Truncate long descriptions
Chem: Move Generate Conformers to Calculate
